plugins.name: margins
plugins.description: Margins for Claude Code — full-fidelity document review (markdown + images) via the margins CLI. Post discussions, read feedback, and manage workspaces. Requires the `margins` npm CLI.

plugins.name: margins-cowork
plugins.description: Margins for Claude Cowork / web — publish markdown for review with no Git, npm, or CLI. Bundled connector, one-time sign-in. Markdown only.
